step_1_catalyst.catalyst_event: H1 2026 interim earnings — first full reporting period reflecting CMP equipment delivery acceleration for domestic logic fabs (SMIC, Hua Hong) ramping mature-node and HBM-adjacent capacity; will reveal whether order book conversion to revenue confirms 35%+ revenue growth and whether GM holds above 44% despite competitive pricing from 盛美/中微 entry attempts in CMP-adjacent areas
step_1_catalyst.catalyst_date_or_window: 2026-08-25 to 2026-08-30 (H1 2026 interim report; STAR Board listed firms typically disclose by end-August)
step_1_catalyst.catalyst_source: SSE STAR Board disclosure calendar; company IR guidance from Q1 2026 results

mechanism_chain: 1. Domestic wafer fab capex (SMIC, Hua Hong, CXMT, YMTC) in 2026 is concentrated on mature-node expansion (28nm and above) and HBM/advanced packaging — both CMP-intensive process steps requiring 8-12 CMP tools per 10K wfr/month capacity

2. Huahai Qingke is sole domestic CMP supplier with proven 14nm-and-above qualification at SMIC; new fab orders default to its Universal-300 platform given U.S. export controls blocking AMAT Reflexion and limiting Ebara access for restricted entities
3. Order book at end-2025 (~RMB 9B+ per company disclosure) converts to revenue with 9-12 month lag → H1 2026 revenue should show 30-40% YoY growth, accelerating from 2025 base

4. Gross margin defense: CMP tool ASP holding firm because (a) no qualified domestic competitor at 14nm, (b) recurring consumables/slurry attach growing as installed base expands — consumables GM >50%
5. If H1 prints rev growth ≥35% AND GM ≥44%, consensus FY2026 EPS revisions upward by 10-15%, triggering re-rating from current ~45x forward P/E toward 55-60x given growth re-acceleration narrative

evidence_quantitative: End-2025 order book disclosed ~RMB 9.2B vs FY2025 revenue ~RMB 4.5B — implied 2.0x book-to-bill
FY2024 revenue RMB 2.46B (+44% YoY), gross margin 45.2%, net margin 25.8% — operating leverage clearly positive (NI growth ~52% vs Rev 44%, ratio 1.18x)
Domestic CMP market size 2026E ~RMB 12-14B (per CINNO Research); Huahai market share ~35-40% domestic, targeting 50%+
R&D spend 18% of revenue — funding 28nm advanced CMP and post-CMP cleaning equipment line extension
evidence_qualitative: Only domestic CMP vendor with repeated repeat-orders from SMIC at 14nm — qualification moat is 18-24 months for any competitor
Entity List status of SMIC/Hua Hong forces 'must-buy-domestic' posture for incremental tool orders, accelerating share gain beyond organic pace
Management has explicitly guided expansion into CMP-adjacent equipment (cleaning, thinning) — installed base monetization optionality

market_consensus.e: Bulls: domestic semicap golden cycle, CMP monopoly position, multi-year revenue visibility from RMB 9B+ order book → fair to pay 50x+ forward P/E. Bears: valuation already prices perfection; competition from 盛美/中微 entering CMP space will compress GM; cyclical fab capex risk in 2027.
market_consensus.z: 多头：国产半导体设备黄金周期，CMP国产垄断，90亿+在手订单提供多年收入可见度，给予50倍+前瞻PE合理；空头：估值已透支完美预期，盛美/中微切入CMP将压制毛利，2027年晶圆厂资本开支存在周期风险。

our_variant.e: Market underweights the CONSUMABLES + post-CMP cleaning attach rate — by H2 2026 recurring revenue (slurry, pads, cleaning) should reach 22-25% of mix vs 15% in 2024, structurally lifting GM toward 46-47% even if tool ASP softens 2-3%. This converts the story from cyclical equipment to hybrid equipment+recurring, justifying re-rating not de-rating.
our_variant.z: 市场低估了耗材+CMP后清洗的配套率提升——到2026H2，循环性收入（抛光液、垫、清洗）占比应达22-25%（2024年仅15%），即使设备ASP小幅下降2-3%，毛利率仍可结构性提升至46-47%。这将故事从周期性设备转为'设备+循环'混合商业模式，支撑估值重估而非压缩。

contrarian_view.what_changes_our_mind: H1 2026 report shows consumables/services revenue mix <18% of total AND gross margin <43%, OR SMIC公开 qualifies a competitor (盛美/中微) CMP tool at 28nm before Q4 2026 — either signal would invalidate the 'hybrid model + monopoly' thesis.

step_4_quantification.metric_target: H1 2026 revenue + gross margin + consumables mix
step_4_quantification.predicted_value: H1 2026 revenue RMB 2.8-3.2B (+35-45% YoY), GM 44-46%, consumables mix 20-23%

step_5_proves_right_if: H1 2026 revenue YoY growth ≥ 35% AND gross margin ≥ 44%
Consumables + services revenue mix ≥ 20% in H1 2026 disclosure
FY2026 consensus EPS revised upward ≥ 10% within 30 days of H1 print
Order book at end-H1 2026 ≥ RMB 9.5B (sequentially flat-to-up from end-2025)
step_6_proves_wrong_if: H1 2026 revenue YoY growth < 25% OR gross margin < 42%
SMIC or Hua Hong public tender awards CMP tool to 盛美/中微 at any node before Q4 2026
Order book at end-H1 2026 declines > 10% from end-2025 (RMB <8.3B)
FY2026 consensus EPS revised DOWN ≥ 8% post-H1 report

step_7_variant_view.variant_view_one_sentence: Market believes Huahai is a cyclical CMP equipment monopoly fully priced at 45-50x → We believe consumables attach rate is converting it into a hybrid equipment+recurring model with structurally higher GM → Mechanism is installed-base monetization through slurry/pad/cleaning that defends margin even as tool ASP normalizes.

expected_pnl_asymmetry.upside_if_right: +30% to +45% over 6 months (re-rating to 55-60x on EPS revision)
expected_pnl_asymmetry.downside_if_wrong: -15% to -20% to fair value floor at 35x forward P/E

phase_1_market_belief.duration_estimate: 2-3 months until H1 2026 interim earnings (late August 2026)
why_market_keeps_buying: Domestic semicap narrative remains dominant macro theme on STAR Board; ETF inflows passively supporting names like 688120
RMB 9B+ order book disclosed at end-2025 provides revenue visibility that bulls extrapolate forward
No competing CMP tool has been publicly qualified at SMIC, sustaining monopoly narrative
early_signs_phase_1_weakening: SMIC Q2 2026 earnings (early August) commentary on capex pacing — any deferral language
Public tender announcements from CXMT/YMTC awarding CMP tools to non-Huahai vendors
Slurry import data (HS code 38249999 sub-category) showing renewed foreign share gain in Q2 2026

optional_long_play.sizing: 5-10% of full conviction (starter position pre-H1 print)
optional_long_play.exit_trigger: Any early sign of phase_1_weakening confirmed OR stock runs +20% pre-earnings (asymmetry compresses)

catalyst_for_reversion: H1 2026 report disclosure of consumables mix and GM — printing on 2026-08-25 to 2026-08-30
Q3 2026 earnings (late October 2026) confirming sustained recurring revenue trajectory
Sell-side EPS revision wave within 1-2 weeks post H1 print
phase_2_reality_recognition.estimated_timing: H1 report 2026-08-25 to 2026-08-30; full re-rating completes by Q3 print late-October 2026

short_play.sizing: N/A — variant is constructive; no short leg
short_play.entry_trigger: Only if early_signs_phase_1_weakening fire AND we flip to bearish — then long-dated OTM put on 688120 (limited liquidity caveat)

position_sizing_curve.phase_1_weakening_confirmed: 40-50% (if pre-print channel checks confirm consumables mix >20%)
position_sizing_curve.phase_2_catalyst_imminent: 70-85% (post H1 print confirming thesis, before Q3 EPS revision wave fully reflected)

data.name: 华海清科

pulse.e: Sole domestic CMP equipment vendor benefiting from forced localization; variant centers on consumables attach lifting GM structurally, with H1 2026 print as resolution event.
pulse.z: 国产CMP设备唯一龙头，受益强制国产化；变体观点聚焦耗材配套率提升带动毛利率结构性上行，H1 2026业绩为关键验证节点。

problem.e: Domestic wafer fabs (SMIC, Hua Hong, CXMT) cannot procure CMP tools from AMAT/Ebara under U.S. export controls; need qualified domestic alternative at 14nm-and-above with full process recipe support.
problem.z: 国内晶圆厂（中芯、华虹、长鑫）受美国出口管制无法采购AMAT/Ebara的CMP设备；急需在14nm及以上节点具备完整工艺配方支持的国产替代方案。

mechanism.e: Universal-300 CMP platform qualified at SMIC 14nm; growing installed base drives recurring consumables (slurry/pad) and post-CMP cleaning attach; R&D pipeline extends into thinning and advanced packaging equipment.
mechanism.z: Universal-300 CMP平台已在中芯14nm验证；装机量增长带动抛光液/垫等耗材及CMP后清洗设备配套；研发管线延伸至减薄和先进封装设备。

moneyFlow.e: Tool sales (~80% of rev, GM 42-44%) → installed base growth → consumables/services (~20% growing to 25%, GM >50%) → blended GM rises toward 46%+ over 2026-2027.
moneyFlow.z: 设备销售（约80%收入，毛利42-44%）→装机量提升→耗材/服务（占比从20%提升至25%，毛利>50%）→综合毛利率2026-2027年向46%+提升。

marketBelieves.e: Cyclical CMP equipment monopoly, valuation fully reflects order book; GM compression risk from domestic entrants.
marketBelieves.z: 周期性CMP设备垄断，估值已反映在手订单；面临国产竞争对手压制毛利的风险。

weBelieve.e: Consumables/cleaning attach is converting business into hybrid equipment+recurring model; H1 2026 should print consumables mix ≥20% and GM ≥44%, triggering re-rating not de-rating.
weBelieve.z: 耗材/清洗配套正将业务转化为'设备+循环'混合模式；2026H1有望披露耗材占比≥20%、毛利≥44%，触发估值重估而非下修。

mechanism.e: Installed base of 200+ CMP tools at domestic fabs generates recurring slurry/pad/service revenue at >50% GM; this defends blended margin even if new tool ASP softens 2-3% amid competition.
mechanism.z: 国内晶圆厂200+台CMP设备装机生成抛光液/垫/服务的循环收入（毛利>50%），即使新设备ASP因竞争小幅下降2-3%，仍可支撑综合毛利率。

rightIf.e: H1 2026: revenue YoY ≥35%, GM ≥44%, consumables mix ≥20%, order book ≥RMB 9.5B.
rightIf.z: 2026H1：收入同比≥35%，毛利率≥44%，耗材占比≥20%，在手订单≥95亿。

wrongIf.e: H1 2026 revenue YoY <25% OR GM <42% OR SMIC/Hua Hong public tender awards CMP to 盛美/中微 before Q4 2026 → reduce position by 70% within 5 trading days.
wrongIf.z: 2026H1收入同比<25%或毛利<42%，或Q4 2026前中芯/华虹公开招标将CMP订单授予盛美/中微→5个交易日内减仓70%。

whatChangesOurMind.e: H1 2026 shows consumables mix <18% AND GM <43%, OR SMIC qualifies competitor CMP tool at 28nm before Q4 2026.
whatChangesOurMind.z: 2026H1耗材占比<18%且毛利<43%，或Q4 2026前中芯在28nm验证竞争对手CMP设备。

rewardToRisk.upsideIfRight: +30% to +45% over 6 months (re-rating to 55-60x forward P/E on EPS revision wave)
rewardToRisk.downsideIfWrong: -15% to -20% to fair value floor at 35x forward P/E

phase1MarketBelief.durationEstimate: 2-3 months until H1 2026 interim earnings (late August 2026)
whyMarketKeepsBuying: Dominant domestic semicap narrative + STAR Board ETF passive flows
RMB 9B+ order book provides multi-quarter revenue visibility
earlySignsPhase1Weakening: SMIC Q2 2026 capex commentary (early August) showing deferral language
Public tender awards to non-Huahai CMP vendors at any major fab

optionalLongPlay.exitTrigger: Phase-1-weakening sign confirmed OR stock runs +20% pre-earnings

catalystForReversion: H1 2026 report 2026-08-25 to 2026-08-30 disclosing consumables mix and GM
Sell-side EPS revision wave within 2 weeks post print
phase2RealityRecognition.estimatedTiming: H1 print late August; re-rating completes by Q3 report late-October 2026

shortPlay.entryTrigger: Only if phase-1 weakening fires and thesis flips bearish

catalysts.e: H1 2026 interim earnings — revenue, GM, consumables mix disclosure
catalysts.z: 2026年中报——收入、毛利率、耗材占比披露

catalysts.e: Q3 2026 earnings confirming sustained recurring revenue trajectory
catalysts.z: 2026三季报验证循环性收入趋势的可持续性

catalysts.e: SMIC/Hua Hong new fab equipment tender results — CMP allocations
catalysts.z: 中芯/华虹新晶圆厂设备招标结果——CMP分配

catalysts.e: Annual analyst day — guidance on cleaning/thinning equipment line extension
catalysts.z: 年度分析师日——清洗/减薄设备线扩展指引

expectation_gap.e: Consensus models tool revenue only; underweights consumables mix uplift to 22-25% by H2 2026.
expectation_gap.z: 市场模型主要建模设备收入，低估耗材占比2026H2提升至22-25%。

fundamental_acc.e: Order book 2.0x book-to-bill; H1 2026 should show revenue acceleration vs 2025 base.
fundamental_acc.z: 订单/销售比2.0倍；2026H1相对2025基数应显示收入加速。

narrative_shift.e: Story shifting from pure cyclical equipment to hybrid recurring model — not yet priced.
narrative_shift.z: 故事从纯周期性设备转向混合循环模式——尚未被定价。

low_coverage.e: Well-covered by domestic sell-side (15+ analysts); coverage gap modest.
low_coverage.z: 国内卖方覆盖较充分（15+分析师），覆盖缺口有限。

catalyst_prox.e: H1 print in ~2.5 months — tight resolution window.
catalyst_prox.z: 中报2.5个月后披露——验证窗口紧凑。

risks.e: Domestic competitor (盛美/中微) qualifies CMP tool at SMIC, breaking monopoly narrative
risks.z: 国内竞争对手（盛美/中微）在中芯验证CMP设备，打破垄断逻辑

risks.e: Fab capex deferral in 2027 as mature-node overcapacity emerges
risks.z: 2027年成熟节点产能过剩导致晶圆厂资本开支推迟

risks.e: Further U.S. export controls on upstream components (precision motors, optics) constraining tool production
risks.z: 美国对上游零部件（精密电机、光学）进一步管制制约设备生产

risks.e: STAR Board liquidity/valuation compression on macro de-risking event
risks.z: 宏观风险事件下科创板流动性/估值收缩

crowd.e: Crowded long among domestic semicap funds; ETF passive holdings significant — vulnerable to flow reversal but supportive on positive print.
crowd.z: 国内半导体设备基金多头拥挤，ETF被动持仓显著——业绩正面时支撑，资金反转时脆弱。

nextActions.e: Channel-check slurry import data (HS 38249999 sub-category) monthly for Q2 2026 to gauge consumables share trajectory
nextActions.z: 月度追踪抛光液进口数据（HS 38249999子类）2026Q2走势，判断耗材份额轨迹

nextActions.e: Monitor SMIC Q2 2026 earnings call (early August) for capex pacing language
nextActions.z: 关注中芯2026Q2业绩电话会（8月初）资本开支节奏措辞

nextActions.e: Track public tender platforms (中招联合, 中国招标投标公共服务平台) for CMP tool awards at CXMT/YMTC/Hua Hong
nextActions.z: 跟踪公开招标平台（中招联合、中国招标投标公共服务平台）中长鑫/长存/华虹的CMP设备中标信息

nextActions.e: Build position 10% pre-print, scale to 40-50% on channel check confirmation, 70-85% post H1 print if thesis confirmed
nextActions.z: 中报前建仓10%，渠道验证后加至40-50%，中报确认后加至70-85%

fin_insights: NI/Rev growth ratio FY2024: 0.85/0.443 ≈ 1.92x — strong positive operating leverage; net income scaling nearly 2x revenue growth pace as SG&A leverages and product mix shifts to higher-margin platforms

Profit scissors spread: gross margin essentially flat at 44.5-45.2% over 3 years but operating margin expanded from 15.5% (FY21) → 30.0% (FY24) — opex leverage is the real story, +14.5pp operating margin expansion over 3 years

Implied growth check: at 48x forward P/E, mean-reverting to sector 25x in 3 years implies ~24% EPS CAGR required; FY25-27 consensus implies ~28% CAGR — slight cushion, but requires variant (consumables uplift) to materialize for upside; downside protection thin if growth disappoints
Balance sheet pristine: net cash RMB 3.3B (~7% of market cap), debt/equity 4%, ROE expanding 5.3% → 15.9% over 3 years; FCF positive supporting R&D pipeline expansion without dilution risk
